North Indian Sugarcane & Sugar Technologists Association

North Indian Sugarcane & Sugar Technologists Association was formed in the year 2015 with an objective for dissemination of knowledge through consultative and participatory process in seminars and conventions.

About NISSTA

North Indian Sugarcane & Sugar Technologists’ Association (NISSTA) works to ensure the well being of nearly 180 sugar factories along with associated professionals, work force and millions of farmers in the northern region. The Association strives to solve the issues of the sector largely in 1 consultation along with the industry experts, scientists, research institutions, farmers and respective ministries of the concerned state Governments.

NISSTA – Main Objective

The main objective of North Indian sugarcane & Sugar technologist’s Association is to prepare the industry to face the unique challenges sugar industry faces year after year, conducting variety of activity around the year

The President

President :
Dr Ram Murti Singh
